title: Missing Content-Security-Policy Header
description: The target response did not include a Content-Security-Policy header. This may reduce browser-side defense against unauthorized script or content loading behaviors.
recommendation: Define and test a Content-Security-Policy aligned to the application. Start with report-only mode, review violations, then enforce once validated.
aiLimitations: This recommendation is AI-assisted and must be validated by a human security reviewer before remediation is finalized.
